defs: short name for 瀋陽|沈阳[Shen3 yang2]
see 瀋河區|沈河区[Shen3 he2 Qu1]
Shenhe, a district of Shenyang City 瀋陽市|沈阳市[Shen3 yang2 Shi4], Liaoning
see 瀋陽市|沈阳市[Shen3 yang2 Shi4]
Shenyang, sub-provincial city and capital of Liaoning Province 遼寧省|辽宁省[Liao2 ning2 Sheng3]
Mukden Palace, aka Shenyang Imperial Palace, the main imperial palace during the early years of the Qing dynasty (1625-1644), a secondary palace in subsequent years, now a museum
